description: Style NoteThese shoes from woodland celebrate the true spirit of adventure and are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. Product Details casual shoes with stitch detailing at the seams of the toe boxThree-hole lace ups with D-ring metal eyeletsPadded tongue and insole for in-step comfortPull loop at the heelRubber midsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs, reinforced onto the upper at the toe box, curved midfoot and a raised heelMaterial and Care Nubuck Use a branded leather conditioner and polish on leather partsUse a suede brush to remove dist from suede partsDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
